description: Next.js evals standardization PR touching ui/database/docs/config/api domains
rationale: Eval test fixtures contain .tsx pages (ui), prisma schema (database), README.md (docs), package.json (config), api routes (api). Genuinely multi-domain PR that should be flagged.
notes: Large PR (5 domains). Evals are test-like but live under evals/ not test/, so not classified as test.
